nasb.text: Then Saul said to David, “You are not able to go against this Philistine to fight with him; for you are but a youth while he has been a warrior from his youth.”

esv.text: And Saul said to David, “You are not able to go against this Philistine to fight with him, for you are but a youth, and he has been a man of war from his youth.”

cnv.text: 掃羅對大衛說：“你不能去與這非利士人決鬥，因為你年紀還輕，那人從小就作戰士。”

ccb.text: 扫罗说：“你不能去，你年纪还小，他却是一个久经沙场的战士。”
